title: Lightly Browned Kenyan Sausages Skewers
description: A halal-friendly Kenyan dish featuring crispy sausages, served with a side of spicy ferment-kimchi, perfect for a solo dinner.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat, around 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together butter, salt, black pepper, and lemon juice.
Add the cut onion and bell pepper to the bowl and toss to coat with the butter mixture.
Thread the marinated onion and bell pepper onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 5 minutes per side, or until they are lightly browned.
Meanwhile, cook the Kenyan sausages in a pan over medium heat, browning them on all sides.
Once the sausages are cooked through, serve them on top of the grilled skewers.
Serve the skewers with a side of ferment-kimchi and enjoy.
Make sure to cook the sausages to an internal temperature of at least 160 degrees Fahrenheit to ensure food safety.
